remarks: Welcome to 16 Burwood Rd, Stamford! This versatile home offers many great features. On the second floor, you'll find a spacious living room filled with natural light, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The dining area seamlessly connects to a kitchen outfitted with modern appliances and ample counter space, ideal for all your cooking needs. This level also features two comfortable bedrooms and a full bathroom. Venture to the third floor to discover additional versatile space. This level includes another bedroom, a cozy living room, a full bathroom, and a convenient wet bar, offering privacy and flexibility for guests or a separate living area. Enjoy your own private deck overlooking the shared backyard, perfect for summer barbecues or a quiet morning coffee. The outdoor area offers a peaceful retreat, great for gardening or enjoying the fresh coastal air. The unit's prime location is a highlight, with just a short walk to the water for scenic strolls or various water activities. Additional amenities include plenty of street parking and close proximity to local shops, restaurants, and parks. This rental unit provides a blend of comfort, convenience, and coastal living in a desirable location. Some photos are renderings to showcase furniture placement.
